overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight and handgun exploring a rain-soaked urban environment at night. The character moves from a circular fountain structure through a park area with a clock tower, then into streets with parked cars and neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular stone fountain basin with shallow water

events.description: character begins circling the central fountain pillar while shining flashlight upward

agents.ego_description: circling the stone fountain structure, examining the carvings with flashlight while holding a handgun

entered.detail: large circular stone basin with shallow water and curved seating tiers
tall ornate stone column with carved details at the center of the fountain
large stone bowl structure atop the central pillar

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a circular stone fountain basin during a heavy downpour at night, shining a flashlight on the ornate central pillar and bowl structure while water pools around their feet.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park with wet pathways and benches

events.description: exits the enclosed fountain area into the open park space
approaches the tall clock tower monument in the park

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps into the park area, passing green benches and iron fences while rain continues to fall

entered.detail: wet stone steps leading up from the fountain basin
green painted wooden bench along the park pathway
black wrought iron fence bordering the park area
tall stone clock tower with illuminated face standing in the park

segments.scene_description: Leaving the fountain behind, the character ascends stone steps into an open urban park area, passing green benches and iron fences while approaching a tall illuminated clock tower through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with clock tower monument and parked vehicles

events.description: moves from the park into the street area with parked cars
approaches and walks past a parked white station wagon

agents.ego_description: circling the clock tower monument then moving toward the street, examining a parked white station wagon with flashlight

notable_agents.action: white station wagon parked on the side of the wet street

entered.detail: white SUV station wagon parked on the street with roof rails
vertical yellow neon sign spelling LIQUOR on a building facade
short yellow posts marking the edge of the parking area

segments.scene_description: The character circles the clock tower monument before transitioning to a street with parked vehicles, examining a white station wagon with their flashlight as neon signs glow in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark urban street with neon signage and parked cars

events.description: continues down the darker section of the street past additional parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking down the rain-soaked street past parked vehicles and neon signs, moving deeper into the urban environment

entered.detail: silver four-door sedan parked on the street
second green park bench along the sidewalk
pink painted trash receptacle near the fence

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the dark rain-soaked street, the character moves past additional parked cars and urban elements including benches and trash cans, with street lamps cutting through the hazy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the center of a rain-drenched plaza into a dark, neon-lit urban street. It begins within a circular stone fountain basin during a heavy downpour, with a flashlight illuminating the ornate central pillar and pooling water. As the character leaves the fountain, the camera ascends stone steps into an open park area, passing green benches and iron fences toward a tall, illuminated clock tower. The scene then shifts as the character circles the monument and transitions onto a street, where the flashlight beam scans a white station wagon against a backdrop of glowing neon signs. Finally, the movement continues down the rain-soaked road, passing parked cars and trash cans under the hazy glow of distant street lamps.
